_meta.author: beratberkayg
_meta.title: Roadmap Card
_meta.description:
The RoadmapCard component is a minimal, animated product roadmap built with shadcn/ui and Framer Motion.
It displays key project milestones in a clean timeline format, supporting light and dark modes out-of-the-box.

Features:

📅 Display quarterly milestones with title, description, and status

✨ Animated timeline dots with fade and slide-in effects

🎨 Minimal, modern design with hover scale effect on dots

🌗 Fully theme-aware (light/dark mode compatible)

🔹 Reusable and dynamic via items prop

Ideal for showcasing product plans, feature releases, or project timelines in a visually appealing and interactive way.
